title: WarrantyReminders
description: Warranties stored against big-ticket purchases and the expiry reminders derived from them (FR-DOC-001). Provided by Module 12 to Tasks (creates a task/reminder) and Inbox (digest alert) and Workspace (returns/claims playbooks). Module 12 EMITS reminder intents; it MUST NOT send push notifications directly — reminders route through the Inbox digest pipeline (ux-foundations §6). Reminder generation is idempotent: re-running for the same warranty + reminder offset does not create a duplicate task/alert (umbrella M13 AS-3 pattern, FR-X-003). Money fields are integer minor units; no binary float. Dates are calendar dates; reminder scheduling computes in UTC.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; authZ from validated session (FR-X-010).

item_name.description: Big-ticket item the warranty covers (e.g. 'refrigerator'). Display localized at the edge.

linked_transaction_id.description: The big-ticket purchase transaction, when linked via a ReceiptLink.

purchase_amount.description: Optional purchase price in integer cents (drives 'big-ticket' classification and at-risk value framing). No float.

coverage_kind.description: Type of coverage; 'credit_card_purchase_protection' may be cross-referenced with Rewards CardLineup perks (informational only).

expires_on.description: Warranty expiry date. Drives reminder scheduling.

expiry_source.description: Provenance of expires_on for explainability. 'computed_from_term' = purchase_date + term_months; the term is shown in reasoning.

term_months.description: Coverage term when expiry is computed from purchase date.

reminders.description: Derived reminder intents emitted to Tasks/Inbox. Generation is idempotent on (warranty_id, offset_days).

reminder_id.description: Idempotency key: UNIQUE on (warranty_id, offset_days). A replay does not create a duplicate task/alert (FR-X-003).

fire_on.description: expires_on minus offset_days (default offsets set in research.md, user-adjustable).

offset_days.description: Days before expiry the reminder fires (e.g. 30).

priority_tier.description: Inbox notification tier (ux-foundations §6.1). Warranty expiry is 'important' (actionable), never 'critical' (reserved for cash-safety).

status.description: 'emitted' once handed to the Inbox digest; 'cancelled' when the warranty is deleted or expiry changes.

localized_summary.description: Bilingual short description for the Inbox item (Constitution II; a single-language summary is a defect).

email_sourced.description: true iff sole/primary source is a connected email; purged on email revocation within 7 days (FR-X-013).
